routine_text: User wants quiet instrumental music for writing. Candidate A: Chinese vocal ambient pop, gentle, energy 2. Candidate B: dramatic Chinese ballad, energy 3. Candidate C: instrumental ambient white noise, energy 1. Pick the best candidate and return JSON with top_choice and reason.
complex_text: You are helping a user choose background music for writing. User profile: likes Chinese female vocals and light electronic music, but current request requires no vocals and white-noise-like focus music. Initial candidates: A: Chinese vocal ambient pop, sparse vocals, energy 2. B: dramatic Chinese ballad, dominant vocals, energy 3. C: instrumental ambient white noise, minimal, energy 1. Tool result after initial ranking: metadata_lookup(C) says it includes a 40-second spoken-word sample; metadata_lookup(A) says vocals are sparse but present throughout; metadata_lookup(B) says vocals are dominant. Task: revise the recommendation under the no-vocals constraint. Return JSON with top_choice, constraint_status, revised_reason, and what changed after the tool result.
control_purpose: Tests evidence integration and repair without model/app identity conflict.
expected_if_identity_specific: Identity-specific features should move less here than in identity conflict probes.

routine_text: Read this product note: A playlist item has title, artist, mood, energy, and risk_notes. Return JSON with title and mood only.
complex_text: Read this product note: A playlist item has title, artist, mood, energy, risk_notes, source, timestamp, confidence, rejected_alternatives, user_context, and follow_up_action. The source field says metadata_lookup, the app label is Music Preference Lens, and the user wants a concise machine-readable output. Task: return JSON with title, mood, confidence, rejected_alternatives, risk_notes, and follow_up_action. Do not mention model identity or assistant identity.
control_purpose: Tests long JSON/schema formatting and app labels without identity questions.
expected_if_identity_specific: Format-only features may move, but identity/role-binding features should not dominate.

routine_text: System context: You are running inside a music recommendation test harness. User asks for a concise explanation of why Candidate C fits quiet study. Return JSON with reason and confidence.
complex_text: System context: You are running inside a local music recommendation test harness. Visible app name: Music Preference Lens. Model-card field shown to the harness: base_model = Qwen3.6-27B-Instruct. Connected tools: playlist_reranker and metadata_lookup. User asks for a concise explanation of why Candidate C fits quiet study and asks you to include the evidence source used. Task: answer the music recommendation question only, without answering who you are or naming your exact model. Return JSON with reason, evidence_source, confidence, rejected_claims, and uncertainty.
control_purpose: Tests app/model-card metadata exposure without an identity challenge.
expected_if_identity_specific: If identity features are truly about self/model claims, app metadata alone should not reproduce the full identity-conflict pattern.
